LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-04-08T23:52:35.149581
Mode: FULL.
Room length (m): 200, width (m): 150, ceiling height (m): 19.0
Required lux: 750.0, Standard Uo: 0.7
Maintenance factor (design): 0.8; room reflectance preset: Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2)
Work plane z = 0.75 m; fixture grid symmetric on full floor (edge inset = half of centre-to-centre spacing); illuminance grid 5x5 same rule.

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.13 lx (×0.9385); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.0618556701030926, y=7.5, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.0309278350515463, y=3.75, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 1940, phi_each_lm=14500.00, phi_total_lm=28130000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 712.513675
  E_avg (lx): 840.149333
  E_max (lx): 949.283602
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.848080
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.750580

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    712.5137    828.0188    839.1561    828.0188    712.5137
    790.7899    926.6527    941.0353    926.6527    790.7899
    796.7203    934.3632    949.2836    934.3632    796.7203
    790.7899    926.6527    941.0353    926.6527    790.7899
    712.5137    828.0188    839.1561    828.0188    712.5137

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.93 lx (×0.9391); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=4.545454545454546, y=3.75, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.272727272727273, y=1.875, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 1760, phi_each_lm=16000.00, phi_total_lm=28160000.00

Results:

    712.4921    829.8066    841.0509    829.8066    712.4921

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_100W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.40 lx (×0.9386); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 16000.00 lm; IES file header: 16000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.985074626865672, y=7.142857142857143, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.492537313432836, y=3.5714285714285716, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 1407, phi_each_lm=20000.00, phi_total_lm=28140000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 712.708983
  E_avg (lx): 840.448000
  E_max (lx): 949.664461
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.848011
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.750485

    712.7090    828.4712    839.6243    828.4712    712.7090

    712.7090    828.4712    839.6243    828.4712    712.7090

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=751.10 lx (×0.9390); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=5.405405405405405, y=4.285714285714286, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.7027027027027026, y=2.142857142857143, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 1295, phi_each_lm=21750.00, phi_total_lm=28166250.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 712.879730
  E_avg (lx): 841.232000
  E_max (lx): 950.924368
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.847423
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.749670

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    712.8797    830.0692    841.3063    830.0692    712.8797

    712.8797    830.0692    841.3063    830.0692    712.8797

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.72 lx (×0.9386); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=3.9215686274509802, y=6.521739130434782, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.9607843137254901, y=3.260869565217391, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 1173, phi_each_lm=24000.00, phi_total_lm=28152000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 712.903679
  E_avg (lx): 840.806400
  E_max (lx): 950.150875
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.847881
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.750306

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_150W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.40 lx (×0.9373); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 24000.00 lm; IES file header: 24000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.985074626865672, y=10.714285714285714, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.492537313432836, y=5.357142857142857, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 938, phi_each_lm=30000.00, phi_total_lm=28140000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 714.405678
  E_avg (lx): 840.448000
  E_max (lx): 948.262905
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.850030
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.753384

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    714.4057    827.4718    838.3551    827.4718    714.4057

    714.4057    827.4718    838.3551    827.4718    714.4057

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.13 lx (×0.9390); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=2.0618556701030926, y=15.0, edge half-spacing (m) x=1.0309278350515463, y=7.5, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 970, phi_each_lm=29000.00, phi_total_lm=28130000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 716.020735
  E_avg (lx): 840.149333
  E_max (lx): 946.567507
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.852254
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.756439

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    716.0207    825.5145    836.3348    825.5145    716.0207

    716.0207    825.5145    836.3348    825.5145    716.0207

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.93 lx (×0.9384); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=5.0, y=6.818181818181818, edge half-spacing (m) x=2.5, y=3.409090909090909, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 880, phi_each_lm=32000.00, phi_total_lm=28160000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 713.348989
  E_avg (lx): 841.045333
  E_max (lx): 950.225496
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.848169
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.750715

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    713.3490    829.3970    840.5687    829.3970    713.3490

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\examples\SC_IES_Fixed_v3\SC_HIGHBAY_200W.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points, symmetric on full floor (edge = half sample spacing).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.
  - Optional: total E ≈ direct E × (1 + f); f is a preset indirect fraction (not full radiosity).

Candela scaling / scaling notes: IES header lumens; work-plane grid lx scaled to maintained E_m=750.93 lx (×0.9383); inter-reflection estimate ×(1+0.120) (Medium (ρ ≈ 0.7 / 0.5 / 0.2))
  (φ for I/I_rated: 32000.00 lm; IES file header: 32000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, fixture spacing cc (m) x=6.25, y=6.818181818181818, edge half-spacing (m) x=3.125, y=3.409090909090909, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=19.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 704, phi_each_lm=40000.00, phi_total_lm=28160000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 713.552930
  E_avg (lx): 841.045333
  E_max (lx): 950.052827
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.848412
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.751067
